title: Pale Cherry Blossom
description: Just resource pack replacing pink cherry to pale
body:
## Pale Cherry Blossom
Just resource pack replacing pink cherry to pale

One day I came up with the idea to make cherries less colorful, so I made this resource pack.

To the question "why another pale wood?" my answer is "this resource pack is intended mostly for people playing on versions older than 1.21.3"

![cherry blossom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76ce740320d2a7406c50e7f3f024bd35dea5b29d.png)
